rejectionReason.description: Why the claim was rejected — set by the reject transition.

bands.description: Ascending, non-overlapping bands inside [min, max]; gaps are legal.

step.description: (max − min) must be divisible by step.

description.description: Privilege summary rendered as the invite-form hint

displayName.description: Server-driven label fallback from the role catalog

statuses.description: Ordered display list; must include active present_on_time and absent poles.

weights.description: Status code → weight in [0, 1], at most 3 decimal places.

roles.description: Lower-snake role slugs live in this team scope

threshold.description: Strictly ascending in array order (array order = rank).

token.description: Shown once. Treat this calendar subscription token as a secret.

effectiveFrom.description: Strict UTC ISO-8601 instant (must end in Z); never in the past (D5).

expectedHeadVersionId.description: Optimistic guard (D8): id of the newest version the client saw for this key, null for "no versions"; omit to skip the check.

effectiveFrom.description: Strict UTC ISO-8601 instant (must end in Z); never in the past (D5).

expectedHeadVersionId.description: Optimistic guard (D8): id of the newest version the client saw for this key, null for "no versions"; omit to skip the check.

expectedHeadVersionId.description: Optimistic guard (D8): id of the newest version the client saw for this key, null for "no versions"; omit to skip the check.

effectiveFrom.description: Strict UTC ISO-8601 instant (must end in Z); never in the past (D5).

expectedHeadVersionId.description: Optimistic guard (D8): id of the newest version the client saw for this key, null for "no versions"; omit to skip the check.

capacity.description: Null means no seat limit — never zero seats.

labelKey.description: i18n key; raw server copy is never rendered
i18n key; raw server copy is never rendered

asOf.description: Per-widget freshness instant reported by its own source

value.description: Typed effective value; null when the key is not configured OR the in-effect row is legacy (D4 — never served unvalidated).

valueState.description: Null only when the key is not configured.

scheduledAtCairo.description: Scheduled instant in Africa/Cairo wall-clock time

parameters.description: String-valued report parameters, bounded and normalized.

created.description: Sessions newly created by this run

skipped.description: Occurrences already present and left untouched

dryRun.description: A dry run performs every check and writes nothing.

teamId.description: Team the invitee is onboarded into at acceptance; null for a platform-scoped invitation

teamRole.description: Team-role slug acceptance grants in the invited team

token.description: One-time plaintext invitation token for manual link delivery (OD-002). Shown once; store the hash only.

teamId.description: Team the invitee is onboarded into at acceptance; null for a platform-scoped invitation

teamRole.description: Team-role slug acceptance grants in the invited team

assignableRoles.description: Role slugs the acting principal may set here — their privilege ceiling

membershipId.description: The membership these roles belong to

roles.description: Role slugs the member currently holds in this team, sorted, lower-snake (for example team_admin)

channels.description: An enabled rule needs at least one channel.

leadHours.description: Required for practice_reminder, forbidden for every other event.

area.description: Catalog area the permission is grouped under

description.description: Short human description of the permission

reason.description: Mandatory audited justification for the promotion

teamName.description: Invited team display name for accept-page confirmation

teamRole.description: Team-role slug acceptance grants in the invited team

end.description: Africa/Cairo wall time; an overnight window (start > end) is valid.

spiritScore.description: Null when spirit was not scored — never zero.

durationSeconds.description: Null when the provider has not reported a duration.

reason.description: Mandatory audited justification for the revocation

isSystem.description: True for the system-seeded default bundles

key.description: Stable role key stored in the roles table

policyVersion.description: RBAC policy version this matrix was read at; changes whenever a role assignment or bundle changes

matchSquad.description: max must be ≥ 7 (a full line) and ≤ roster.max.

value.description: The stored document. Typed per key when valueState is "valid"; the raw legacy document (visible for the replace flow) when "legacy".

oneOf.description: Legacy stored document that predates the typed settings contract.

dryRun.description: A dry run parses and reconciles but writes nothing.

opponentName.description: Resolved opponent display name; null for our-team rows or when the opponent record has been deleted.

ratings.description: Criterion key to 1-5 rating. Out-of-range values are dropped.

deletedAt.description: Soft-removal instant; null while the team is present

reason.description: Optional explanation. Persisted on the claim (and returned as rejectionReason) when the transition is reject; recorded nowhere else — reject is terminal, so the reason is the claim’s epitaph.

urgentCancellationOverride.description: Allow urgent practice cancellations during quiet hours.

endSecond.description: Null for an open-ended mark rather than a range.

get.description: Projects raw participation inputs from finalized attendance against the cited default rule version. When no default scoring rule is configured (a fresh database), responds 409 with messageKey errors.practices.attendanceRuleMissing — clients render "attendance scoring is not configured yet" and never retry.

409.description: No default attendance scoring rule is configured (errors.practices.attendanceRuleMissing)

get.description: Same projection as the self read, for staff. Responds 409 with messageKey errors.practices.attendanceRuleMissing when no default scoring rule is configured.

post.description: The status is derived from the server clock, never trusted from the client. A new check-in must fall inside the explicit window: it opens 60 minutes before startsAt and closes at the session end, and only published/rescheduled sessions accept check-ins — otherwise 409 with messageKey errors.practices.checkInWindowClosed. Venue/geo/check-in-code policy is explicitly none: the window is the whole rule. A finalized sheet responds 409 errors.practices.attendanceLocked.

409.description: Outside the check-in window or session not check-in-able (errors.practices.checkInWindowClosed), or the sheet is finalized (errors.practices.attendanceLocked)
